items.line_en: You do think it's a waste.

coach.say: You do think it's a waste.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You do think it's a waste.

items.line_en: That's for being so selfish and greedy.

coach.say: That's for being so selfish and greedy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's for being so selfish and / greedy.

items.line_en: Everything is okay, so it's all good.

coach.say: Everything is okay, so it's all good.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Everything is okay, / so it's all good.

items.line_en: Did I just hear force king sing, sorry?

coach.say: Did I just hear force king sing, sorry?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Did I just hear force king sing, / sorry?

items.line_en: It's not like I cannot say sorry.

coach.say: It's not like I cannot say sorry.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's not like I cannot say sorry.

items.line_en: The fuel was a bit of a waste, but force king must have learned not to be.

coach.say: The fuel was a bit of a waste, but force king must have learned not to be.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The fuel was a bit of a waste, / but force king must have learned not to be.

items.line_en: learned not to be so greedy.

coach.say: learned not to be so greedy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: learned not to be so / greedy.
